EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} created the new process {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {object.account.id} created the new process {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created the new process {object.process.name} as the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {object.account.name} created the new process {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
